events.title: A Taste of Grand Bazaar *POSTPONED*
events.description:
*This event has been postponed*
Grand Bazaar NYC, a storied Upper West Side institution known for shopping with a charitable mission, is crossing the river for its inaugural Brooklyn event at Industry City. The curated pop-up will transform Courtyard 5/6 into a boutique, curated showcase of exceptional vintage, makers, and one-of-a-kind treasures, making it the tastiest Saturday of the Summer. A Market with a Mission, Grand Bazaar NYC donates its proceeds to four public schools. You won’t want to miss a special opportunity in the borough of love!
events.vendor: A Taste of Grand Bazaar *POSTPONED*

events.title: Sake and Cheese Pairing Class and Brewery Tour
events.description:
Step away from that bottle of vino and join us to sample the absolute best beverage to pair with cheese – We are talking about sake! If you haven’t yet tried pairing craft sake and premium cheese, you are in for a revelation. We’ll explore a wide range of flavors and textures… and together, we’ll discover the most exciting combinations of sake styles and cheeses from around the world. The experience is fun, interactive and absolutely delicious! Join us at Brooklyn Kura to learn about sake where sake is made!
What’s included:
A welcome sake to get you started!
A brief intro to sake and cheese basics.
Guided Tasting of 5 Japanese craft sakes from different regions paired to perfection with 5 outstanding cheese varieties.
Exploration of sake and cheese production styles and terrior.
Enjoy some nibbles and spreads on your cheese board that will take the pairing over the top.
Handouts so you can bring your newfound sake and cheese knowledge home
Finish with a Guided tour through our new Sake Brewery
events.vendor: Sake and Cheese Pairing Class and Brewery Tour

events.title: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour
events.description:
Set against the iconic backdrop of Sunset Park’s historic waterfront, the massive, revitalized structures of Industry City form a breathtaking stage for an exclusive culinary journey. This premium food and cocktail tour is a curated exploration of taste and craft, transforming an evening into a memorable, high-end experience.
Your adventure begins with artistic bonbons at Lilac Chocolates, explores gourmet imports at Sahadi’s, and includes a refined whiskey tasting at Fort Hamilton Distillery, followed by a sophisticated sake flight. Savor additional artisanal discoveries within the awe-inspiring industrial halls.
Perfect as a distinctive date night, this tour is also fully customizable for private groups and corporate retreats. We specialize in tailoring this engaging experience for team-building and client entertainment, making it an ideal one-day corporate outing. A sophisticated mini-vacation for locals and a profound discovery for visitors.
events.vendor: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour

events.title: House of Goal: FREE World Cup Bronze Medal Game Watch Party
events.description:
House of GOAL is taking over Brooklyn’s Industry City as the center of global football culture. Daytime access is free and open to the public.
Register for Tickets to Experience:

Live shows and podcasts with soccer legends, including The Rondo, DRAFTED, Soccer Girl Pod, Foz Cast, Front Three and more.
Join or watch street soccer and skill battles with local & global players
Watch live matches on the big screen
Explore global food & flavors, exclusive fashion drops, gaming and art

House of GOAL is family-friendly. Come early, stay late, experience it your way.
Don’t just watch the game, stand at the center of global football culture.
events.vendor: House of Goal: FREE World Cup Bronze Medal Game Watch Party

events.description: Archetypal Collage: Cancer Season is a creative, reflective workshop blending art-making, astrology, and archetypal symbolism. Connect to your roots through symbolic teachings, collage art, curated playlists, and personalized 1:1 archetypal mini-readings.

events.title: Chris "Catman" Grant Presents: Si, Pero…No Live
events.description:
Chris Grant presents: Si, Pero…No Live

Chris Grant brings his signature high-energy, culturally sharp comedy to Eastville for a special late-night experience.

Blending real-life storytelling, Dominican culture, and unapologetic humor, ‘Si, Pero…No Live’ delivers a fast-paced lineup of top NYC comedians in an intimate room built for big laughs.

This is not a drop-in show it’s a curated comedy experience with strong performances, real crowd interaction, and a vibe you feel the second you walk in.

Come ready to laugh, react, and be part of the night.
events.vendor: Chris "Catman" Grant Presents: Si, Pero…No Live

events.description:
Join our Resin Craft Accessary Workshop by little bloomtale hosted by Kajiha!
Discover the art of resin crafting and make your own beautiful jewelry pieces filled with our dried flowers!
In this hands-on, relaxing workshop, you’ll design and create your very own resin accessories—now with even more options to choose from, including necklaces, earrings, bracelets, and keychains (with more to come!).
• All materials provided
• Perfect for beginners and craft lovers alike
• Take home your own handmade accessory
Let your creativity bloom and craft something truly special with us!

events.title: Brooklyn Robot Foundry Summer Circuits! Every Day
events.description:
Join us for Summer Circuits at Industry City!
254 36th Street, Building 2- Suite C249 ( Second Floor)
We’ll be building a different robot every day, all summer! The highlight of our summer programs is the daily robot-building, of course! And we’ll also be playing games, making crafts, enjoying free play, going outside, and more. Our experienced instructors are passionate about inspiring young minds, fostering creativity, championing kindness, and celebrating some goofiness throughout it all.

events.title: Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, Saint Luke at The Bandshell
events.description:
Click here for tickets! https://wl.eventim.us/event/tyler-miller-gio-genesis-saint-luke/698010?afflky=Getitrightthefirsttime
Industry City and Get It Right Music in association with Murmrr Presents are thrilled to present Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, and Saint Luke at Industry City Bandshell playing three sets under the stars in Brooklyn’s Sunset Park!
Event Info
Date: July 25, 2026
Doors: 4:00pm
Set 1: 4:30pm
Set 2: 5:15pm
Set 3: 6:15pm
Tickets: $15 per person plus fees in advance/$20 per person day of show
16+
Address: Industry City Bandshell Stage, Courtyard 1/2 at Industry City in Brooklyn New York between 36th and 37th street and 2nd and 3rd Avenues.
ENTER 238 36th Street, Brooklyn, NY on your GPS device
The venue is located in an open-air courtyard featuring a full concert sound stage. Fans can get affordable drinks from the venue’s bar and order food from over 17 options inside the adjoining food hall. Concert is rain or shine.
How to get here:
Take the D, N, R lines to 36th street station in Brooklyn and walk west one block to Industry City. 3 stops from Manhattan. 30 minutes from Herald Square.
From Long Island, take the LIRR to Atlantic Terminal then take the D, N or R train to 36th street.
Saint Luke:
Saint Luke is an American singer-songwriter, multi-instrumentalist and producer from New York City. With influences in the world of R&B, jazz, folk and rock, Luke is a genre-bender through and through. His first two self-produced EP’s, “PURE LIGHT” and “warrior of solitude” demonstrated his range and production skills, exploring themes of heartbreak and acceptance. With the release of his upcoming debut album, Luke is exploring a different palette of sounds. Featuring more raw, acoustic instrumentation and more nuanced themes of change and grief, the production leaves room for the songwriting to shine.
Gio Genesis:
New York’s Gio Genesis is a story-driven R&B & Hip-Hop artist blending cinematic vocals with raw rap energy. In a genre he calls Gio-Pop, Genesis doesn’t seek to fit in anyone’s box, infusing elements of multiple sounds and timelines to create a perfect storm of enjoyability and relatability.
Tyler Miller:
Influenced by many eras of Pop, R&B, Hip Hop, and Rock music, the New York native singer/songwriter has crafted a signature sound that resonates with a wide range of listeners. Known for his cinematic visuals and passionate live performances, Tyler Miller has created a world that is unique, but familiar.
events.vendor: Tyler Miller, Gio Genesis, Saint Luke at The Bandshell
